title: Philips Avent Soothie Orthodontic Baby Pacifiers, 100% Silicone Pacifiers, One Piece, BPA-Free, for Babies 0-3 Months, Green, 4 Pack, Model SCF190/41
features: Pacifiers 0-3 months distributed in hospitals nationwide: trusted by medical professionals to calm newborns
Orthodontic pacifier with symmetrical nipple that supports proper oral development: a collapsible, symmetrical nipple supports the natural oral development of your baby’s teeth and gums
100% medical grade silicone: made entirely from flexible medical grade silicone, specially created for newborns of 0-3 months; adheres to the American Academy of Pediatrics guidelines¹
Fingerheld solution: uniquely designed so that you can place your finger in the nipple. This helps you create an even stronger bond by helping your baby suckle
Baby pacifier that's compatible with Snuggle: Philips Avent Soothie is also sold with Snuggle, a plush toy that helps babies find, hold and love their Soothies
Easy to clean: its design stops water from getting trapped in the nipple; simply use a sterilizer or submerge in boiling water, replace after 4 weeks of use for hygiene reasons
The set includes: 4x Philips Avent Soothie Pacifiers for newborns 0-3 months, green
description: Product Description Philips Avent Soothie one-piece newborn pacifiers are specially sized and shaped for babies 0-3 months old and adhere to the American Academy of Pediatrics guidelines¹. The set includes 4 green pacifiers. Soothies are made of hospital-grade, BPA-free and latex-free silicone for comfort and durability. A collapsible, symmetrical-shaped nipple supports healthy oral development and promotes your baby's natural suckling instinct. The unique finger-held design lets you place your finger in the nipple so parents and caregivers can bond and connect with the baby, making it easier to share the care. This also makes cleaning easy and prevents water from getting trapped in the nipple. Clean Soothie pacifiers with your sterilizer or submerge them in boiling water. For hygiene reasons, replace soothers after 4 weeks of use. Soothies are compatible with Soothie Snuggle pacifier holders, a soft animal plush toy for babies to hold. The Soothie and plush toy detach so parts can be cleaned separately. Philips Avent Soothie is distributed in hospitals nationwide. 92% of moms trust Soothie for their newborns² ¹ American Academy of Pediatrics recommends to “purchase pacifiers that cannot possibly come apart. Those molded of one solid piece of plastic are particularly safe”. (Caring for Your Baby and Young Child: Birth to Age 5, 7th ed. 2019, By American Academy of Pediatrics, Tanya Remer Altmann and David L. Hill, New York: Bantam Books.) ² of moms aware of Soothie Safety Warning Check the pacifier regularly for signs of wear and tear. If the pacifier shows any cracks, tears, or damage, dispose of it immediately to prevent a choking hazard.
